offer: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause legal penalties. We provide renewal alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to law firms with a demo video
Participate in community forums for legal tools
try_it: Let users try contract storage and renewal alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
